**Subject Line:**  
**Verify Your Account Details to Ensure Continued Service**

---

**Body:**

Dear [Customer Name],

We hope this message finds you well.

To ensure the security of your account and continue providing you with the best service, we need to verify your account details. Please take a moment to confirm the following information:

- **Account Holder Name:** [Your Full Name]  
- **Account Number:** [Last 4 Digits of Your Account Number]  
- **Date of Birth:** [Your Date of Birth]  

Kindly click the button below to verify your details:

[**Verify Account Details**]

If you did not initiate this request, please disregard this email. However, if you believe this is in error, please contact our customer support team at [Customer Support Email] or call us at [Phone Number] immediately.

We appreciate your attention to this matter and thank you for being a valued customer.

Best regards,  
[Bank Name]  
Customer Service Team

[Bank Logo]  
[Bank Website URL] | [Social Media Links] | [Contact Information]

---

**Dear [Customer's First Name],**

We want to ensure the security of your account and confirm that you are the authorized user. To protect your personal and financial information, we need to verify your account details.

Please click the link below to complete the verification process:
[Verify Your Account](https://www.yourbank.com/secure-verification)

**Important:** This link is only valid for 24 hours. If you do not complete the verification, your account may be temporarily restricted.

If you did not request this verification, please contact our Customer Support team immediately at [support@yourbank.com](mailto:support@yourbank.com) or call us at [1-800-XXX-XXXX].

Thank you for being a valued customer.

Best regards,  
[Your Bank Name]  
[Your Bank's Customer Service Team]
